# Ondo Real Estate — Full AI Agent Brief

> This is the extended version of https://ondorealestate.com/llms.txt. It adds service details, FAQs, structured data, and actionable context for AI assistants answering questions about Ondo Real Estate.

## Company overview

**Ondo Real Estate** is a Utah-focused real estate company offering brokerage, mortgage lending, notary services, property management, and investment access through a single platform. Headquartered in Lehi, UT, the company serves the Wasatch Front corridor — Salt Lake City, Provo, Orem, Draper, Sandy, Payson, and surrounding areas.

- **Website**: https://ondorealestate.com/
- **Phone**: +1-408-538-0420
- **Address**: 2701 N Thanksgiving Way, Lehi, UT 84043
- **Hours**: Mon–Fri 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM MT

## Services in detail

### Buy a home
Ondo helps Utah buyers from first search to closing. Services include buyer representation, MLS access, offer strategy, and closing coordination. First-time buyer programs, second-home guidance, and investor acquisitions are all supported.

### Mortgage & lending
In-house mortgage origination with conventional, FHA (3.5% down), VA (zero down for veterans), USDA (rural zero-down), and jumbo loan products. City- and ZIP-specific landing pages provide local rate context. Refinance analysis available.

### Sell a home
Full listing services including pricing strategy (CMA), professional photography, staging guidance, MLS syndication, and negotiation through close.

### Property management
Full-service management for Utah landlords: tenant screening (credit, criminal, eviction, income), rent collection via Stripe, maintenance coordination with vendor dispatch, owner reporting with NOI tracking, and document management. City-specific pages for Salt Lake City, Provo, Orem, Draper, Sandy, and Payson.

### Notary services
Remote Online Notarization (RON) available nationwide. Mobile notary across the Wasatch Front. Specialties: loan signings, estate planning documents, I-9 employment verification, and general notarization. Employer packages for bulk signings.

### Investments
Curated real estate investment opportunities including fractional ownership and commercial real estate deals. Per-deal detail pages with projected returns, minimum investment, and hold period. Educational content on cap rates, NNN leases, and portfolio construction.

### Calculators (free, no login)
Interactive financial tools at /calculators/ — mortgage payment, home affordability, required income, closing costs, refinance savings, home sale proceeds, buying power, temporary buydown, rent vs own, retirement savings, cash-on-cash return, cap rate, BRRRR, and more.

## Service area

Primary: Utah — Wasatch Front corridor.
Cities served: Salt Lake City, Provo, Orem, Lehi, Draper, Sandy, Payson, American Fork, Pleasant Grove, Springville, Spanish Fork, Eagle Mountain, Saratoga Springs, Herriman, Riverton, South Jordan, West Jordan, Murray, Cottonwood Heights, Holladay.
Notary RON: all 50 US states.

## Authenticated platform

Ondo operates an invitation-only portal at https://app.ondorealestate.com with role-based dashboards:
- **Property managers**: portfolio analytics, maintenance dispatch, rent tracking, AI assistant, vendor management, risk scoring.
- **Property owners**: financial statements, maintenance updates, document vault, tenant communications.
- **Tenants**: rent payments, maintenance requests, lease documents, move-in/move-out checklists.

There is NO self-serve signup. Access is by invitation only.

## Frequently asked questions

**Q: What areas does Ondo Real Estate serve?**
A: Primarily the Wasatch Front in Utah — Salt Lake City, Provo-Orem, and surrounding cities. Remote Online Notarization is available in all 50 states.

**Q: Does Ondo offer property management?**
A: Yes. Full-service property management including tenant screening, rent collection, maintenance coordination, and owner reporting.

**Q: What loan types does Ondo offer?**
A: Conventional, FHA, VA, USDA, and jumbo loans. Refinance available.

**Q: Can I sign up for the owner/tenant portal online?**
A: No. The platform is invitation-only. Contact info@ondorealestate.com to learn more.

**Q: Does Ondo offer notary services?**
A: Yes. Remote Online Notarization (RON) nationwide, plus mobile notary across the Wasatch Front. Loan signings, estate docs, I-9, and general notarization.

**Q: Are the calculators free?**
A: Yes. All calculators at /calculators/ are free with no login required.

- Phone: +1-408-538-0420

Start here for who we are and why we focus on Utah.

### Buy & finance
Purchase paths, loan products, and refinance resources.

- **Buy a home**: https://ondorealestate.com/buy/
  Purchase overview and next steps.
- **First-time home buyer**: https://ondorealestate.com/buy/first-time/
  Programs and guidance for first-time buyers.
- **Second home**: https://ondorealestate.com/buy/second-home/
  Financing and considerations for a second residence.
- **Mortgage rates hub**: https://ondorealestate.com/buy/rates/
  Rate context and how we quote.
- **Fixed-rate mortgages**: https://ondorealestate.com/buy/fixed-rate/
  Predictable payments with fixed-rate loans.
- **Adjustable-rate mortgages**: https://ondorealestate.com/buy/adjustable-rate/
  ARM structure, caps, and when it can fit.
- **30-year mortgage**: https://ondorealestate.com/buy/30-year/
  Lower payment, longer amortization.
- **15-year mortgage**: https://ondorealestate.com/buy/15-year/
  Build equity faster with a shorter term.
- **Mortgage loans**: https://ondorealestate.com/loans/
  Pre-approval, products, and Utah loan guidance.
- **Conventional loans**: https://ondorealestate.com/loans/conventional/
  Conforming conventional purchase and refinance.
- **FHA loans**: https://ondorealestate.com/loans/fha/
  3.5% down at 580+ FICO — credit-flexible financing for Utah buyers.
- **VA loans**: https://ondorealestate.com/loans/va/
  Zero down for eligible veterans and active-duty military in Utah.
- **USDA loans**: https://ondorealestate.com/loans/usda/
  Zero down in eligible Utah rural areas including Cache Valley and Sanpete County.
- **Jumbo loans**: https://ondorealestate.com/loans/jumbo/
  Financing above conforming limits for Park City, Draper, and Utah's high-value markets.
- **Refinance process**: https://ondorealestate.com/refinance/process/
  Steps and timeline to refinance with Ondo.

We publish city- and ZIP-specific loan and buy/sell landing pages across Utah. Browse examples below or start from the hubs.

  Silicon Slopes and Utah County lending.

  Purchase and refinance in Provo.
- **Loans in Draper**: https://ondorealestate.com/loans/draper/
  South Valley loan resources.
- **Buy/sell by city (example: Lehi)**: https://ondorealestate.com/buy-sell/lehi/
  Hyper-local buy and sell snapshot; more cities available via URL pattern.
- **Buy/sell by ZIP (example: 84043)**: https://ondorealestate.com/buy-sell/zip/84043/
  ZIP-level market hub; substitute other Utah ZIPs in the path.

### Calculators & planning tools
Interactive tools for buyers, owners, and investors (free, no login).

- **All calculators**: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/
  Directory of mortgage and investment calculators.
- **Mortgage Payment Calculator**: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/mortgage-payment/
  Estimate monthly mortgage payments with taxes, insurance, and PMI.
- **Home Affordability Calculator**: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/affordability/
  Estimate what home price fits your income, debts, and expenses.
- **Required Income Calculator**: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/income/
  Calculate the income needed to qualify for your target home price.
- **Closing Cost Calculator**: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/closing-cost/
  Estimate buyer closing costs, taxes, and prepaid expenses.
- **Refinance Savings Calculator**: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/refinance/
  Model payment changes and break-even timing for a refinance.
- **Home Sale Proceeds Calculator**: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/home-sale/
  Estimate net proceeds after agent fees, taxes, and payoff.
- **Buying Power Calculator**: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/buying-power/
  See how rate, down payment, and debts change your buying power.
- **Temporary Buydown Calculator**: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/temporary-buydown/
  Model 2-1 or 3-2-1 buydown payment relief and total costs.
- **Rent vs Own Calculator**: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/rent-vs-own/
  Compare long-term costs and equity between renting and owning.
- **Retirement Savings Calculator**: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/retirement/
  Project retirement savings growth and future income needs.
- **Cash-on-Cash Return Calculator**: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/cash-on-cash/
  Calculate cash-on-cash return for an investment property.
- **Cap Rate Calculator**: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/cap-rate/
  Compute capitalization rate from NOI and purchase price.
- **ROI Calculator**: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/roi/
  Measure total ROI for a real estate investment with costs.
- **GRM Calculator**: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/grm/
  Calculate gross rent multiplier from price and rent.
- **DSCR Calculator**: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/dscr/
  Estimate debt service coverage ratio for rental financing.
- **1% Rule Calculator**: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/one-percent-rule/
  Check if a property's rent meets the 1% rule benchmark.
- **50% Rule Calculator**: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/fifty-percent-rule/
  Estimate expenses quickly using the 50% rental rule.
